goal: Fix bin/commands/_loader.cjs for bundled-exe context: add scripts/build-manifest.mjs that enumerates bin/commands/*.cjs at build time and writes bin/commands/_manifest.cjs with explicit requires for each command module. Update _loader.cjs to import from _manifest when present (bundled case), fall back to readdirSync when _manifest absent (dev case). Wire the manifest generator into scripts/build-bun-release.mjs as a pre-bundle step. Success: npm run build:release produces a gad.exe where 'gad team --help' lists all team subcommands and no 'Cannot find package citty' errors fire.
